pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 56 opens Firefox to http://localhost:8080/QualityTestRoom; README.md confirms 'Join room QualityTestRoom'; export_result.sh line 41 checks for room name in report

setup_task.sh line 49 removes pre-existing report at this path; export_result.sh lines 22-30 check for report at this path; README.md line 20 specifies 'Write diagnostic report to /home/ga/Desktop/meeting_quality_report.txt'

docker-compose.yml lines 6-7 expose port 8080 mapped to container port 80; setup_jitsi.sh lines 78-84 wait for and confirm Jitsi at http://localhost:8080; task_utils.sh line 4 sets default to http://localhost:8080

privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic benchmark where agents join a self-hosted Jitsi Meet instance at http://localhost:8080, navigate to the room 'QualityTestRoom', perform diagnostic actions (access connection statistics, adjust video quality, switch to tile view, check speaker statistics), and write findings to /home/ga/Desktop/meeting_quality_report.txt. Jitsi is deployed via Docker containers using stable-9753 images with XMPP server, conference focus (jicofo), and video bridge (jvb) components. All metadata values (room_name, report_path, jitsi_url) are correct and correspond to the actual environment configuration.
